I am looking for an upgrade for my 60 pally for the back slot. AC is irrelevant to me (1388 AC), I was sorting on total resists and HP. This is certainly the easiest obtainable cloak to fit up near the top of that list.

RE: got one
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2002 at 10:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766204325
44 posts
Hey clan, as a rogue, I would gladly trade this for a Heiro Cloak, the 4 stam (read about 15-20 hps at my level), str (several ATK points if im soloing its nice) , dex and agility on heiro would outweigh the 15 dis/poison on this as the last time i was poisoned / diseased was running thru FM some gobby got lucky and got a dot off as i was zinging by to PL a guildee in OT. ANYHOW yea, Me, in my right mind, would trade. Rogue.

64 posts
does anyone have a clue as to who this is dropped by? this would be very very nice to have. =) in my experiances poison/disease resistances haev been quite a challenge to find, after you drop the stien), granted i can swap it out, but i dont feel like looking like a lowbie again. :p

and the 75 mana sure does beat the 1int on my Loam cloak. :p
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 17 2001 at 3:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I Found one of these on the ground under a epic mage and i sold it for idol of the thorned, cone of mystics, and thick banded belt, im guessing this cape is worth a lot i think i could have gotten more
Nice for druids as well
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 2:16 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750012638
View User Forum
Sage
137 posts
Wow, this item is a very nice upgrade for my druid and I guess for most of the druids out there. Its a nice replacement for the Mammoth, Kunzar or Rygorr Oracle cloaks that most druids wear and the few Wis you lose for switching to that will be awarded with some nice AC, HP, Mana and Resists. Sweet.


▲ Page top
grrrr
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 6:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ACTUALLY, this is a nice item for almost anyone out there. I'd like this on any of my 5 casters (all 3 wis casters and my necro and wizzy) and also on my SK, Pally, and Rogue. Yes, my rogue could use the extra 2 ac and the 75 hp, of course he can't use the darn mana. bottom line is that it's not a bad cloak, although there are cloaks out there that top this one. Also, anyone who says that wis casters aren't pure casters obviously hasn't played one past 25.
▲ Page top
Stupid Hybrid Comment
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 5:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767537723
View User Forum
16 posts
Ok, it's been forever since I posted on the boards but I need to take this time to laugh at the stupid "Just Hybrids can use all the bonuses on this cloak" remark. Any class can use ALL the bonuses on this cloak... ask an int caster if they could live without resists, ac, hp, and mana... hp and resists are the main stats for an int caster with 200 int and on top of that, this adds 75 mana... you decide.
▲ Page top
RE: Stupid Hybrid Comment
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 4:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780842228
Sage
52 posts
Well, no... a warrior can't use a mana bonus.
▲ Page top
mmm mana/resists
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 9:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
yum! grab this baby in time for a trak raid. Other then that a decent cloak for melees with the 10ac and 75hp, and the 75 mana good for casters. I'd wear this over my mamoth hide cloak :)
▲ Page top
RE: mmm mana/resists
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 9:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965989413
134 posts
Actually, I think this would be a great hybrid item. +mana for casting, +HP for tanking, great AC for back slot, and good resists. That can be an extra Stun spell against Caster mobs, an extra heal when the Cleric/Druid is LOM-- all around, good stats. Note: I am NOT saying this is ONLY for hybrids. Just that hybrids can use all the bonuses on this cloak.
▲ Page top
RE: mmm mana/resists
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 5:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768229189
40 posts
>>Just that hybrids can use all the bonuses on this cloak.

The only classes that can't use all the stats are classes that don't use mana. HP items are VITAL for a 50+ caster.. Right now I'm using a spider fur cloak as an enchanter (10ac/4str/4sta/6sv cold) because it's 10ac. I have chosen to wear black sapphire earrings that are 35hp 25mana instead of 25hp 35mana, because those extra 20 hp's help me more than that 20 mana does. Not tanking does NOT mean you don't need ac or hp's.

Frankly, this is a damn sweet cloak for anyone, except monks. Might be my own bias showing through, but I think it's better for casters... There are better cloaks for melee's that are easier to get, (spider fur cloak, shimmering terror hide cloak..) but still, that MHO...
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 12 2001 at 6:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) do you love it? i loooooooooooove it, i got it at ross!but seriously 75hp and mana and 15 to some of the harder to find resists,<atleast in my opinion>
Would love this on Tallon Zek
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 4:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757554872

425 posts
Cool. Great PVP item. At least for me. I always seem to get messed up by diseases or poison.
